name: Demo Configuration — GT Invention Studio (80 ft x 50 ft)
description: Position bindings for the 21 demo elements. Based on Rahul's default-configuration.json positions. Laser and CNC are in the same row with a 2.0 ft gap (below the 3 ft ADA minimum) to create a realistic intentional ADA violation. Import AFTER (1) Import Floor Plan and (2) Import Elements via Element Builder. Then calibrate scale to 80 ft x 50 ft so simulations run in real feet.

notes.ada_violation: Laser right edge: x=32+9=41%. CNC left edge: x=43.5%. Gap: 2.5% of 80 ft stage = 2.0 ft = 24 in. ADA minimum corridor width is 36 in. Gap fails by 1 ft. BFS distance transform will flag all cells in this gap red.
notes.noise_sources: Welding (95 dBA, p=0.3), Wood Room (95 dBA, p=0.4), Waterjet (90 dBA, p=0.4), CNC and Metal (88 dBA, p=0.5) are the primary contributors. Laser (72 dBA) adds moderate noise. 3D Printing (55 dBA) stays below the ambient threshold used by the sim.
notes.egress: Exit North is at the top-right corner, Exit South at the bottom-right. BFS seeds from both exits. Max travel distance from the far left of the dense shop should stay inside the NFPA 200 ft limit for a sprinklered industrial occupancy.
